description.value: Drink this potion (a single action) to regain @Damage[1d8[vitality,healing]] Hit Points.

This bomb deals @Damage[1d4[sonic]] and @Damage[(1[splash])[sonic]] splash. Each creature within 10 feet of the burst must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:17] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} until the end of its next turn.
The nature of this alchemical bomb is unclear.
